d-i-y-2026.name: D.I.Y 2026
d-i-y-2026.description:
D.I.Y 2026 is a grassroots fighting game tournament arriving in New York City to provide a no-frills, highly competitive event for the community. Moving away from corporate aesthetics, the independent gathering offers a back-to-basics bracket experience, drawing a strong pool of talent for its featured Street Fighter 6 competition.

Game Lineup

The weekend operates on a streamlined schedule where all brackets begin and conclude on the same day. Street Fighter 6 stands out as a major highlight of Sunday's programming, drawing competitors looking to test their skills in Capcom's flagship title. Sunday will also feature brackets for Guilty Gear -Strive- and Street Fighter III: 3rd Strike. Saturday's lineup offers a robust schedule of its own, hosting tournaments for Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves, 2XKO, and Tekken 8.

Registration and Prizes

Players can purchase either single-day or full-weekend competitor passes until the June 1st deadline. Spectator passes are also available for five dollars for those attending to watch the action unfold. Across the featured titles, including the highly anticipated Street Fighter 6 bracket, the prize pool is distributed among the top four finalists in a 50, 25, 15, and 10 percent split. Additionally, the top eight players will receive custom medals, and the first-place winner is awarded a skateboard.

evo-2026.name: Evo Vegas 2026
evo-2026.location: 300 Convention Center Dr, Las Vegas, NV 89109, USA
evo-2026.description:
Evo 2026 returns to Nevada as the world's most prestigious fighting game tournament. Scheduled for June 26 through June 28, 2026, the event will transform the West Hall of the Las Vegas Convention Center into a three-day celebration of competitive fighting games, bringing together competitors, creators, and gaming communities from across the globe.

As the ultimate destination for the FGC, the 2026 tournament features a high-stakes lineup on the biggest stage. The event is headlined by a massive open bracket for Street Fighter 6, guaranteeing that absolute world-class talent will be in attendance to fight for the highly coveted trophy.

Premier Tournament Lineup

Beyond Street Fighter 6, the historic 12-game competitive roster includes heavy-hitting staples and modern favorites. Attendees will clash in TEKKEN 8, Guilty Gear -Strive-, Riot's 2v2 fighter 2XKO, and SNK's Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves. The main stage also welcomes Granblue Fantasy Versus: Rising, Under Night In-Birth II Sys:Celes, Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage, and fresh additions like Invincible VS and Rivals of Aether II.

More Than a Tournament

Evo is designed to be a complete destination experience fueled by energy, culture, and real competition. Attendees can take a break from the brackets to enjoy publisher and developer panels, hands-on experiences at developer booths, a sprawling vendor hall, the legendary Artist Alley, and Evo's iconic 300+ cabinet free-play arcade.

Registration

Registration and bracket sign-ups are managed through Start.gg and the official Evo website. Competitors can secure their spots in the tournament until late registration closes on May 25, 2026. General admission passes are available online for spectators wishing to experience the electrifying Arena Finals Experience, the live commentators, exclusive merchandise, and the greatest fighting game stage on earth.

s-factor-x3.name: S Factor X3
s-factor-x3.location: Centro Expositor Puebla, Av. Ejército de Oriente No. 100, Zona Cívico Cultural 5 de Mayo, 72260 Heroica Puebla de Zaragoza, Pue., México
s-factor-x3.description:
S Factor X3 arrives at the Centro Expositor Puebla as Latin America's premier Super Smash Bros. major. Celebrating twelve years of competition, the massive event draws an estimated 3,000 international competitors and 40,000 attendees to the vibrant city of Puebla. While its roots and main stage are deeply dedicated to the Smash franchise, the gathering serves as a massive destination for the broader fighting game community with a diverse lineup of traditional titles.

Featured Competitions

For fans of traditional fighters, the weekend offers a robust schedule where Street Fighter 6 stands out as a key attraction. The Street Fighter 6 bracket draws top-tier talent looking to test their skills and secure victories within the massive multi-game environment. The traditional fighting game lineup is further bolstered by highly competitive brackets for Tekken 8 and Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves. Additionally, the event features intense showdowns in 2XKO, Guilty Gear -Strive-, and iconic regional favorites like The King of Fighters '98.

Registration and Venue

Competitor passes for the bracket stages running from July 15th through the 19th are available via Start.gg. The main exhibition takes place over the weekend, offering general admission for fans eager to watch the action across all gaming communities. Beyond the tournament setups, the venue hosts expansive zones dedicated to cosplay, content creators, and an artist alley, ensuring an unforgettable experience for everyone in attendance.

get-on-my-level-2026-canadian-fighting-g.name: Get On My Level 2026 - Canadian Fighting Game Championships
get-on-my-level-2026-canadian-fighting-g.location: 5875 Airport Rd, Mississauga, ON L4V 1N1, Canada
get-on-my-level-2026-canadian-fighting-g.description:
Get On My Level 2026 returns as Canada's premier fighting game championship. Long recognized as a massive event with deep roots in the Super Smash Bros. community, the tournament brings thousands of competitors and fans to Mississauga, Ontario. While its legacy is heavily tied to the Smash franchise, the gathering has expanded to become a major competitive destination for the broader fighting game community with a diverse lineup of traditional titles.

Featured Competitions

For fans of traditional fighters, the weekend offers a robust schedule where Street Fighter 6 takes a prominent spot on the lineup. The Street Fighter 6 bracket draws a fierce pool of talent looking to test their skills and claim victory within the electric multi-game atmosphere. The traditional fighting game roster is further bolstered by highly competitive brackets for Tekken 8, Guilty Gear -Strive-, Granblue Fantasy Versus: Rising, and Under Night In-Birth II Sys:Celes.

Registration and Venue

Competitor passes for the event are available via Start.gg, with multiple registration phases leading up to the July 24th deadline. The main exhibition takes place over the weekend at the Hilton Airport Hotel, offering spectator passes for fans eager to watch the action across all gaming communities. Beyond the primary tournaments, the event features team formats, crew battles, and an opportunity to connect with the passionate Canadian esports scene.
